title: Luna-Small-Tweaks
description: Tweaks to existing textures to make them feel updated as how I see it
body:
### About
This Resource Pack does various of tweaks to make it feel more vanilla as how I see it since many textures havent really got much of a change especially like the brewing stand, buckets, minecarts, etc  

## Examples
![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6ZbK4RBO/images/0c9949ea45485626a70d8bb82728049847420211.png)  
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6ZbK4RBO/images/57396936587e297d793a8d03932c9a55bbd1989b.png)  


_Compatibility between mods is also planned_
